title: Proteomics of Primary Cilia by Proximity Labeling.
author: Mick DU Rodrigues RB Leib RD Adams CM Chien AS Gygi SP Nachury MV
content: S-EPMC4662609 PMC4662609 Proteomics of Primary Cilia by Proximity Labeling. While cilia are recognized as important signaling organelles, the extent of ciliary functions remains unknown because of difficulties in cataloguing proteins from mammalian primary cilia.
